title: Capturing Live Music at Fort Mose Jazz & Blues Festival
excerpt: Two years shooting the Fort Mose Jazz & Blues Festival in St. Augustine. From Gary Clark Jr to Samara Joy, here's what it takes to capture live music at one of Florida's most meaningful cultural events.
author: diego-cerquera

hero.alt: Gary Clark Jr performs on stage at Fort Mose Jazz Festival in St. Augustine, Florida

banner.alt: Large crowd gathered at illuminated outdoor concert stage at Fort Mose Jazz Festival

content.alt: Band performs on stage with colorful lighting at Fort Mose Jazz Festival
content.caption: Capturing the full stage during performances

content.alt: Samara Joy performing with orchestra at Fort Mose Jazz Festival
content.caption: Grammy-winner Samara Joy brought the house down

content.alt: Concert audience members raising hands and applauding during live music performance
content.caption: The crowd energy is just as important as the performers

content.alt: Ledisi performing energetically on stage with arms outstretched
content.caption: Ledisi brought incredible energy every second she was on stage

seo.title: Fort Mose Jazz & Blues Festival Video & Photography | First Sight Films
seo.description: Behind the scenes of shooting the Fort Mose Jazz & Blues Festival in St. Augustine. Two years of live music photography and event videography featuring Gary Clark Jr, Samara Joy, and more.
